name: territory-developer
description: Unity project root scripts delegate to tools/mcp-ia-server (IA / JSON tooling). Local post-implementation checks: npm run verify:local (canonical) — validate:all (includes territory-compute-lib build) then Unity/Postgres bridge chain; npm run verify:post-implementation is an alias. Run npm ci in tools/compute-lib / tools/mcp-ia-server if build or test:ia fails. Bridge-only: npm run db:bridge-playmode-smoke. Local compile smoke: npm run unity:compile-check (loads repo-root .env/.env.local via tools/scripts/load-repo-env.inc.sh; macOS can fall back to Unity Hub path from ProjectSettings/ProjectVersion.txt — AI agents must not skip this because $UNITY_EDITOR_PATH is empty in the shell).

scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:dead-project-specs && npm run compute-lib:build && npm run test:ia && npm run validate:fixtures && npm run generate:ia-indexes -- --check
scripts.closeout:verify: npm run validate:dead-project-specs && npm run generate:ia-indexes -- --check
